BIRTHDAY TOMORROW THURSDAY 17TH APRIL 
CELEBRATION AND ALBULM LAUNCH PLUS SCREENING OF 'HUCK IT' THE MOVIE ALL HAPPENING FROM 830PM
THE OAK TIGHES HILL IN THE FRONT BAR. PLAYING NEW ALBULM FROM START TO FINISH THEN 2ND SET OF 'GREASTEST HUCK HIT'S' RECORDING IT TOO SO IF YOU WANNA HURL SOME OBSCENITIES MAY GET TO HEAR IT DOWN THE TRACK. 
GOT HANK GREEN ON LAPSTEEL & @muddtone ON HORNS ASWELL AS @ben.mccauley.94 GUITAR @robodread DRUMS & @nikirrem ON UPRIGHT BASS. 
NEW ALBULM SHOULD BE AVAILABLE IN PHYSICAL FORM IF @implantmedia GET DELIVERY SORTED INTIME

SATURDAY 20TH 
IM DOIN THE SINGING THING WITHOUT INSTRUMENT OTHER THEN TRAY FULL OF VODKA SODA'S WITH 
@fahm.band OPENING THINGS UP AT THE OAK FOR 
@thedunhillblues CELBRATING THERE NEW ALBULM ON
@outtaspace_presents & @eviltonerecordsaus

POSTER @hiss__design

ð¥´LETS GET DRUNK & HUCK'ð
ALBULM OUT 17TH APRIL.  GOOD FRIDAY EVE. 
FESTIVITIES AT ð«@theoak.tigheshill ð« 8:30PM
PLAYIN' 2 SETS ONE OF THE NEW ALBULM START TO FINISH THEN GREATEST HIT'S SET OR GREATEST MISSES. SCREENING OF 'HUCK IT' THE MOVIE. WHICH SHOULD OF HAPPENED WHEN RELEASED 'HUCK IT' ALBULM TIME AINT ALWAYS YER FREIND. 
MIGHT RUN A RAFFLE AGAIN FOR 'HUCK PRIZE PACK' 

ITS MY BIRTHDAY, I ORGANISED A DAY OFF FOR EVERYONE THE NEXT DAY TOO. 
OAK'S GOT A DINNER DEAL. 

Huckleberry birthday dinner
1/2 roast chicken, chips and gravy
Vodka lime soda
$30
Milo and ice cream for dessert.

MILO'S GOT @theostrivia 
THINK IT STARTS AT 6:30PM. 
BEST TO BOOK A TABLE IN ADVANCE THOU. 

MY BIRTHDAY ONLY COMES ROUND ONCE A YEAR, ARENT ABLE TO COME ALONG MIGHT SEE YOU NEXT YEAR. 

ð¥´LETS GET DRUNK & HUCK'ð
AFTER THE RELEASE OF 'HUCK IT' & 'HUCKIN IT!LIVE & ALONE. ALREADY THIS YEAR. TEAMED UP AGAIN WITH LONG TIME SUFFERERS BEN MCCAULEY, NIC WRIGHT,TOM FAIRLEY & JAMES MUDD. THIS ALBULM WAS RECORDED AS QUICK AND AS CHEAP AS POSSIBLE. IN TOM'S BASEMENT WE RECORDED ALL 10 VOCAL AND RYTHM TRACKS IN ONE AFTERNOON. 
BEN RECORDED HIS PARTS IN HIS 'FREE' TIME AND SAME WITH MUDD. THEN MITCH MASHED EM ALL TOGEATHER AND WHAT YOULL HEAR IS WHAT WE GOT. 
PRIMARILY THEY ARE ALL SONGS I STOLE FROM THE REPERTOIRE OF JAZZ BAND I WAS IN YEARS AGO (JACK MCCULAIN'S FRENCHMEN ST NEWORLEANS JAZZ BAND) AND SOME OTHERS PINCHED ALONG THE WAY. 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#happybirthdayâ¤ï¸#goodfridayeve#easterweekend
#thursdaynight#huckleberryandthedevilsdandruff #huckit

The album took 3 years or more to make. 
Covid put a big spanner in the works but it's done now. ððð
Available on record and cd. 
It's on Bandcamp, no other streaming stuff. Maybe if we can  cover at least the petrol cost of the operation. â½
Pretty tired from it all feels like pushing shit uphill. 
This is the last show of the year and 'Devils dandruff' Christmas party. ð§âð
@ben.mccauley.94 @robodread @nic_jon @newcastlelive @newcastleherald @citynewcastle.au @younghenrys 
#newcastle #hillbillyjazz#hillbillyblues
#huckleberry #huckit #huckberry #huckleberryandthedevilsdandruff

Everyone doubted it could make it.  Mechanic's,Mum Dad, Neighbours and even myself but somehow Toyota Camry made it to Vittoria and back. It was touch and go for a bit there. Completely conkted out at a petrol station in Yass. Fellar got us goin by giving the battery bit of a kick. It's a long long boring drive along the Hume. Not rushing to do it again. 
Playing the last show of the year and maybe ever the way they have been goin'. 
This weekend Saturday 14th December @theoak.tigheshill ð¥³ 8pm 
@the.howlin.rats & @steelcitysue_music 
It's also our work Christmas party of 'Devils dandruff band'. @ben.mccauley.94 @nic_jon @robodread
Thanks to @lulietavern & @moondogwildwest 
'Melbourne Dandruff' @casssh_williamsss @east_bay_way @majormagik ð
Hope to see some familiar faces. The roads been a bit lonesome ð«  
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
